title: citrus medicolimonum
intro: Citrus medicolimonum, also known as lemon myrtle, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its aromatic leaves and flowers. The leaves of the plant have been traditionally used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of lemon myrtle include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Lemon myrtle can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or added to food and beverages, making it a versatile and natural remedy.
